name: manolii

plugins.name: manolii-om
plugins.description: Operational Memory skills for Claude Code — propose-only fact capture, read-only readiness / staff-answer, and client handover. Requires a Knowledge Layer MCP backend (contract schemas live in <your-om-contracts-repo>/contracts/operational-memory/).
